---
title: "Homeless Percent Tiles"
format: html
editor: visual
params:
  year: "2023-24"
  lea: "Dixon Unified"
  student_group: "homeless"
---

```{r setup}

library(tidyverse)

percent_indicators <- c("absenteeism", "graduation", "suspension", "college/career")

homeless <- read_csv("data/homeless.csv") %>% 
  filter(county_name == "Solano")
dashboard <- read_csv("data/ca_dashboard.csv")
enrollment <-  read_csv("data/enrollment.csv") %>% 
  select(-ends_with("code"))
solano_to_orange <- read_csv("data/solano_to_orange.csv") %>% 
  mutate(currstatus = if_else(indicator %in% percent_indicators,
                              paste0(currstatus, "%"), as.character(currstatus)))


homeless_in_lea <- 
  homeless %>%
  filter(academic_year == params$year,
         (district_name == params$lea & aggregate_level == "D" 
         & charter_school == "All" & dass == "All") |
           (aggregate_level == "S" & school_name == params$lea))

homeless_count_cumulative <-
  homeless_in_lea %>%
  filter(reporting_long == "Total Students") %>% 
  pull(homeless_student_enrollment) %>% 
  nth(1)

selected_to_orange <- 
  solano_to_orange %>% 
  filter(color == 1,
         academic_year == params$year,
         (school_name == params$lea & aggregate_level == "S") |
           (district_name == params$lea & aggregate_level == "D")) %>% 
  mutate(reporting_long = fct_relevel(as_factor(reporting_long), 
                                      "Homeless Youth",
                                      "Foster Youth")) %>% 
  arrange(reporting_long)

foster_count <-
  selected_to_orange %>%
  filter(reporting_long == "Foster Youth",
         !is.na(student_count)) %>% 
  pull(student_count) %>% 
  nth(1)

homeless_count <-
  selected_to_orange %>%
  filter(reporting_long == "Homeless Youth",
         !is.na(student_count)) %>% 
  pull(student_count) %>% 
  nth(1)


  
```
